params.name: Peacock Throne
params.description: The Peacock Throne is the seat of the emperors of the Mughal Empire. It features two peacock-shaped decorations at the back of the throne inlaid with various precious gems. As a symbol of power, it witnessed the rise and fall of the Mughal Empire.
